an5.40:1.0.1: "Himavantaṁ, bhikkhave, pabbatarājaṁ nissāya mahāsālā pañcahi vaḍḍhīhi vaḍḍhanti. Katamāhi pañcahi? Sākhāpattapalāsena vaḍḍhanti; tacena vaḍḍhanti; papaṭikāya vaḍḍhanti; pheggunā vaḍḍhanti; sārena vaḍḍhanti. Himavantaṁ, bhikkhave, pabbatarājaṁ nissāya mahāsālā imāhi pañcahi vaḍḍhīhi vaḍḍhanti.
an5.40:1.0.2: Yathā hi pabbato selo,araññasmiṁ brahāvane;Taṁ rukkhā upanissāya,vaḍḍhante te vanappatī.
an5.40:1.0.3: Tatheva sīlasampannaṁ,Saddhaṁ kulaputtaṁ imaṁ;Upanissāya vaḍḍhanti,Puttadārā ca bandhavā;Amaccā ñātisaṅghā ca,Ye cassa anujīvino.
an5.40:1.0.4: Tyassa sīlavato sīlaṁ,cāgaṁ sucaritāni ca;Passamānānukubbanti,ye bhavanti vicakkhaṇā.
an5.40:1.0.5: Idha dhammaṁ caritvāna,maggaṁ sugatigāminaṁ;Nandino devalokasmiṁ,modanti kāmakāmino"ti.
